## Plan
Describe the decision-complete plan used before implementation.

## Design Decisions
List key interfaces, tradeoffs, and why this approach was chosen.

## Test Evidence
Provide exact commands run and pass/fail outcomes.

## Risks/Gaps
Call out known risks, deferred work, and any untested areas.

## Protocol Checklist
- [ ] Branch name starts with `codex/`
- [ ] Planning and design were completed before implementation
- [ ] All completed-task changes were committed and pushed
- [ ] PR is opened as draft by default (or exemption explicitly justified)
